name: Detect Squares
description:
You are given a stream of points on the X-Y plane. Design a data structure that:
- add(point) Adds a new point.
- count(point) Given a query point, counts the number of ways to choose three other points from the data structure such that the four points form an axis-aligned square with positive area. An axis-aligned square has sides parallel to the X and Y axes.
constraints: point.length == 2. 0 <= x, y <= 1000. At most 3000 calls to add and count.

performance.stress_intent: exercise interleaved add/count operations that punish brute-force pair enumeration over all stored points
